	 Evaluating JavaScript expression //format date to MM/DD/YYYY format
function formatDate2(dt) {
	var d = new Date(dt);
	var padMonth = (d.getMonth()+1).toString().length == 1 ? '0' + (d.getMonth()+1).toString() : (d.getMonth()+1).toString();
	var padDay = d.getDate().toString().length == 1 ? '0' + d.getDate().toString() : d.getDate().toString();
	return padMonth + "/" + padDay + "/" + d.getFullYear().toString();
}

//format date to YYYY/MM/DD format
function formatDate3(dt) {
	var d = new Date(dt);
	var padMonth = (d.getMonth()+1).toString().length == 1 ? '0' + (d.getMonth()+1).toString() : (d.getMonth()+1).toString();
	var padDay = d.getDate().toString().length == 1 ? '0' + d.getDate().toString() : d.getDate().toString();
	return d.getFullYear().toString() + "-" + padMonth + "-" + padDay;
}

function getDayOfYear(date) {
    var startOfYear = new Date(date.getFullYear(), 0, 0);
    var diff = date - startOfYear;
    var oneDayMilliseconds = 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24;
    var dayOfYear = Math.floor(diff / oneDayMilliseconds);
    return dayOfYear;
}

function DaysInMonth(Mo, Yr) {
    if(Mo == 1 || Mo == 3 || Mo == 5 || Mo == 7 || Mo == 8 || Mo == 10 || Mo == 12) {
        return 31;
    }
    else if(Mo == 4 || Mo == 6 || Mo == 9 || Mo == 11){
        return 30;
    }
    else {
        var f = new Date(Yr, 2, 0);
        return f.getDate();
    }
}

function yearValidation(year) {
    var text = /^[0-9]+$/;
    if (year != 0) {
        if ((year != "") && (!text.test(year))) {
            return false;
        }
    
        if (year.length != 4) {
            return false;
        }
        // var current_year=new Date().getFullYear();
        if((year < 1900)) {
            return false;
        }
        return true;
    }
}

function formatDate(dt) {
	var d = new Date(dt);
	var padMonth = (d.getMonth()+1).toString().length == 1 ? '0' + (d.getMonth()+1).toString() : (d.getMonth()+1).toString();
	var padDay = d.getDate().toString().length == 1 ? '0' + d.getDate().toString() : d.getDate().toString();
	return d.getFullYear().toString().substring(2) +  padMonth + padDay;
}

function formatTime(tm) {
	var t = new Date(tm);
	var padHour = t.getHours().toString().length == 1 ? '0' + t.getHours().toString() : t.getHours().toString();
	var padMin = t.getMinutes().toString().length == 1 ? '0' + t.getMinutes().toString() : t.getMinutes().toString();
	var padSec = t.getSeconds().toString().length == 1 ? '0' + t.getSeconds().toString() : t.getSeconds().toString();
	return padHour +  padMin + padSec;
}; to value 
function formatTime(tm) {
    var t = new Date(tm);
    var padHour = t.getHours().toString().length == 1 ? "0" + t.getHours().toString() : t.getHours().toString();
    var padMin = t.getMinutes().toString().length == 1 ? "0" + t.getMinutes().toString() : t.getMinutes().toString();
    var padSec = t.getSeconds().toString().length == 1 ? "0" + t.getSeconds().toString() : t.getSeconds().toString();
    return padHour + padMin + padSec;
}
